title: AWS SQS SendMessage (query-encoded request, XML response)
description: SQS's SendMessage action also uses the AWS "query" protocol: a form-urlencoded POST to the service root. Point the SDK at Lyrebird via AWS_ENDPOINT_URL. This recipe matches ANY POST to "/", so install only one query-protocol recipe (SNS or SQS) at a time unless you add a distinguishing header/priority.
